nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 乍得
nodes.summary: 乍得是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联65种鸟类，包括Schlegel's francolin、Clapperton's spurfowl、Arabian bustard等65种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸨形目

nodes.name: 马里

nodes.name: 布吉納法索
nodes.summary: Burkina Faso is a landlocked country in West Africa.

nodes.summary: 冈比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联64种鸟类，包括Stone partridge、White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl等64种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 喀麦隆
nodes.summary: 喀麦隆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联176种鸟类，包括非洲黑鴨、Black guinea fowl、Western crested guinea fowl等176种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塞内加尔
nodes.summary: 塞内加尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联88种鸟类，包括White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl、绿冠蕉鹃等88种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 苏丹
nodes.summary: 苏丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Sand partridge、Scaly spurfowl等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 科特迪瓦
nodes.summary: 科特迪瓦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联107种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl等107种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸨科
nodes.summary: 鸨科（Otididae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如大鸨、Arabian bustard、灰颈鹭鸨等26种鸟类。

nodes.name: Savile's bustard
nodes.summary: Savile's bustard（Savile's bustard，学名 Lophotis savilei），分类上属于鸨形目，并归入鸨科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、滩涂，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Otididae are an Old-World and understudied family of birds mostly found in Afro-Tropical regions. It is found in Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Chad, Ivory Coast, Gambia, Mali, Mauritania, Niger, Nigeria, Senegal, and Sudan

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Found in the hotspots of the Bustard species which includes arid and semi-arid habitats. They live in bush and light woodland, near dried pools and clearings, and flat shrubs with Aristida grass and Acacia raddiana. This is similar to the rest of the family Otididae, which typically live in temperate and tropical lowland dry grassland habitats. Found in SW Mauritania and Senegal E through Mali, Burkina Faso, SW Niger, NE Nigeria, and Chad to C Sudan. The Savile's bustard used to be thought as restricted to the Sahel biome but has now been seen to have expanded southwards

This is similar to the rest of the family Otididae, which typically live in temperate and tropical lowland dry grassland habitats. Found in SW Mauritania and Senegal E through Mali, Burkina Faso, SW Niger, NE Nigeria, and Chad to C Sudan. The Savile's bustard used to be thought as restricted to the Sahel biome but has now been seen to have expanded southwards

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: According to the IUCN Red List, the Savile's bustard is listed as least concern with their population trend being stable. Due to this species' large range, relatively high population densities, and no evidence of declines or substantial threats, it is not considered threatened. It appears to be fairly common in the Yankuri Game Reserve, Nigeria. The species was first recorded in N Cameroon in November 1995, in The Gambia in September 1996, and in N Benin in January 2005. Despite this species having a stable population trend, many bustard species populations are at risk and declining due to agricultural changes, overgrazing, hunting, trapping, habitat loss, and droughts.{{Cite journal|last1=Bailey|first1=T
